en_title: Steam Machine Engineers at Valve Signal Grim Future as Memory Crisis Is 'Still Getting Worse'
cn_title: Valve工程师警告内存危机「仍在恶化」
subtitle: 降价无期
opus_summary: Valve的Steam Machine工程师警告，AI推动的内存危机仍在恶化，零售端价格比大宗供应状况滞后至少3至6个月。Valve称设备生产受内存产能限制，短期内也无法降价。

paragraphs.en: Steam Machine engineers at Valve have warned the ongoing memory crisis in tech is "still getting worse" as buyers face already exorbitant prices.
paragraphs.cn: 在消费者已经面对高昂价格之际，Valve的Steam Machine工程师警告，科技行业持续的内存危机「仍在恶化」。

paragraphs.en: Yazan Aldehayyat and Pierre-Loup Griffais, two individuals who helped bring the new gaming hardware to life, offered their perspective on how the AI industry has influenced the high cost of RAM during an interview with . In case you thought things were already bad enough, they've got an update: the months ahead aren't looking too good.
paragraphs.cn: 参与打造这款新游戏硬件的Yazan Aldehayyat和Pierre-Loup Griffais在接受[原文此处缺失内容]采访时，谈到了AI行业如何推高RAM成本。如果你以为情况已经够糟，他们带来的最新判断是：未来几个月也不容乐观。

paragraphs.en: "Honestly, it’s still getting worse," Aldehayyat said. "Just in case people are not aware. What people are seeing on retail shelves right now, from our observations, is lagging what we’re seeing from a bulk supply by at least three to six months."
paragraphs.cn: Aldehayyat说：「老实说，情况仍在恶化，可能有人还没有意识到这一点。根据我们的观察，人们现在在零售货架上看到的状况，比我们在大宗供应端看到的情况至少滞后3至6个月。」

paragraphs.en: The Steam Machine launched with a price tag of $1,049 for its base 512GB model alone . Its most expensive option, a 2TB version bundled with a Steam Controller, is a whopping $1428.
paragraphs.cn: Steam Machine基础款仅配备512GB存储，上市价就达到1,049美元(约合人民币7112元)。最贵的2TB版本捆绑Steam Controller，价格高达1,428美元(约合人民币9682元)。

paragraphs.en: Aldehayyat said Valve had expected to run into some trouble when it formally announced the device in November 2025, but not like this. Griffais went as far as to say that Valve has been "building everything we can get our hands on," adding the company has been "limited by memory capacity, for sure."
paragraphs.cn: Aldehayyat表示，Valve在2025年11月正式公布设备时就预计会遇到一些麻烦，但没想到会严重到这种程度。Griffais甚至称Valve一直在「把所有能拿到的零件都做成产品」，并补充说公司「毫无疑问受到了内存产能限制」。

paragraphs.en: "We knew there was going to be an issue with sourcing," Aldehayyat said. "But the extent was beyond anything we actually expected."
paragraphs.cn: Aldehayyat说：「我们知道采购会出现问题，但严重程度超出了所有实际预期。」

paragraphs.en: Part of Valve's time during what has rapidly become a tumultuous period for tech has seen it struggling to keep up with demand for the Steam Deck , too. The Half-Life company also said it 'would love' to make the Steam Machine 'more affordable' but warned that a price drop wouldn't arrive 'any time soon.'
paragraphs.cn: 在这段迅速变得动荡的科技行业时期，Valve也一直难以满足Steam Deck的需求。这家《半衰期》开发商还表示，「很愿意」让Steam Machine「更实惠」，但警告降价「短期内不会到来」。

paragraphs.en: Valve is far from the only company to ring the alarm bells when it comes to the memory crisis from the last few months. Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra said he expected the RAM shortage to last through 2027 . Epic Games boss Tim Sweeney warned in late 2025 that high-end PC gamers will struggle with prices "for several years." As Sony and Microsoft charge ever closer to the release of new next-gen gaming consoles, the former has said it's still deciding when and how to launch the PS6 .
paragraphs.cn: 过去几个月里，就内存危机拉响警报的远不止Valve。美光CEO Sanjay Mehrotra预计RAM短缺将持续至2027年；Epic Games负责人Tim Sweeney则在2025年末警告，高端PC玩家将在「未来数年」承受价格压力。随着索尼和微软逐步接近推出新一代游戏主机，前者表示仍在决定何时以及如何发布PS6。

paragraphs.en: For more, you can read about what Griffais had to say about Valve's approach to the RAM shortage during an interview with IGN earlier this year . You can also see what Valve had to say about its relationship with RAM companies .
paragraphs.cn: 如需了解更多，可以阅读Griffais今年早些时候接受IGN采访时对Valve应对RAM短缺方式的说明，以及Valve对自身与RAM厂商关系的说法。
